title: SS Progression Week 3
purpose: Week 3: longer intervals at higher intensity

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your friends are posting their VO2max workouts on Strava. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2: where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy does it. 65% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 91% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 50% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 50%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
